introSection: Yeti Trek is a steel roller coaster currently located at Santa's Village in Bracebridge, Ontario, Canada.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The ride was announced on 26 August 2024.

Yeti Trek opened on 3 July 2025.

fullText:
Yeti Trek is a steel roller coaster currently located at Santa's Village in Bracebridge, Ontario, Canada.

The ride was announced on 26 August 2024.

Yeti Trek opened on 3 July 2025.
